rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE LEON J. WILLIAMS REVOCABLE TRUST DATED 10/5/99 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT , Or, In The Alternative, For Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Respondent Betty Williams's Motion for Summary Judgment, or, in the alternative, for Summary Adjudication is continued by the Court's own motion to December 10, 2021, at 9:00 a.m.
